CREATE TABLE numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE id = 1 - 1;
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE id = 2 - 1;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE id = 1) - (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE id = 2);
SELECT (n1.value - n2.value) AS difference FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.id != n2.id;
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value > (5 - 3);
SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN (10 - 5) AND (10 - 2);
SELECT (SELECT SUM(value) FROM numbers) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers);
SELECT (SELECT AVG(value) FROM numbers) - (SELECT MAX(value) FROM numbers);
SELECT id, (value - 1) AS adjusted_value FROM numbers WHERE adjusted_value > 0;
